sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64689" key="makroponi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μακρο-πονία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n64689.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">long labour</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:353" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">353</biblScope> </bibl> Chambry.</sense> </entryFree>
